content.text: EXAMPLE — classic first scan. Drawing: a smiley stick hero standing on a short pencil ledge at the lower-left, three floating horizontal platforms leading right, a red spiky patch under the middle gap, a small key resting on the middle platform, a door drawn in front of a flag on the far-right platform, and the handwritten words "3 LIVES".

{"primary_genre":"platformer","genre_confidence":0.93,"mood":"cheerful","hero":{"id":"hero_1","name":"Smiley","bbox":[0.05,0.58,0.15,0.78],"style_ref":"blue-crayon-stick"},"entities":[{"id":"plat_0","role":"platform","bbox":[0.02,0.78,0.18,0.82],"behavior":"static","linked_to":null,"style_ref":"pencil-line"},{"id":"plat_1","role":"platform","bbox":[0.2,0.7,0.4,0.74],"behavior":"static","linked_to":null,"style_ref":"pencil-line"},{"id":"plat_2","role":"platform","bbox":[0.5,0.55,0.7,0.59],"behavior":"static","linked_to":null,"style_ref":"pencil-line"},{"id":"plat_3","role":"platform","bbox":[0.78,0.55,0.98,0.59],"behavior":"static","linked_to":null,"style_ref":"pencil-line"},{"id":"haz_1","role":"hazard","bbox":[0.42,0.85,0.5,0.92],"behavior":"static","linked_to":null,"style_ref":"red-spikes"},{"id":"key_1","role":"key","bbox":[0.56,0.48,0.62,0.55],"behavior":"static","linked_to":"door_1","style_ref":"pencil-key"},{"id":"door_1","role":"door","bbox":[0.86,0.41,0.9,0.55],"behavior":"static","linked_to":null,"style_ref":"brown-door"},{"id":"goal_1","role":"goal","bbox":[0.92,0.41,0.97,0.55],"behavior":"static","linked_to":null,"style_ref":"triangle-flag"}],"goal":{"kind":"reach_goal","target_id":"goal_1"},"rules":{"lives":3,"difficulty_hint":"normal","modifiers":[]},"palette":["#3b6fb5","#000000","#e23b2e","#8a5a2b"],"assumptions":["The drawn key opens the drawn door because they belong together.","The red spiky patch is a hazard that costs a life."],"flags":[]}
EXAMPLE — placemat maze. Drawing: a top-down maze of three thick corridor walls, a small mouse doodle at the top-left opening, a wedge of cheese at the bottom-right.

{"primary_genre":"maze","genre_confidence":0.9,"mood":"cheerful","hero":{"id":"hero_1","name":"Mouse","bbox":[0.06,0.08,0.14,0.18],"style_ref":"grey-doodle"},"entities":[{"id":"wall_1","role":"platform","bbox":[0.22,0.05,0.28,0.66],"behavior":"static","linked_to":null,"style_ref":"corridor-wall"},{"id":"wall_2","role":"platform","bbox":[0.46,0.34,0.52,0.95],"behavior":"static","linked_to":null,"style_ref":"corridor-wall"},{"id":"wall_3","role":"platform","bbox":[0.7,0.05,0.76,0.6],"behavior":"static","linked_to":null,"style_ref":"corridor-wall"},{"id":"goal_1","role":"goal","bbox":[0.84,0.82,0.94,0.92],"behavior":"static","linked_to":null,"style_ref":"cheese-wedge"}],"goal":{"kind":"reach_goal","target_id":"goal_1"},"rules":{"lives":3,"difficulty_hint":"normal","modifiers":[]},"palette":["#888888","#f5c518"],"assumptions":["The maze is top-down; each drawn wall blocks movement and the mouse reaches the cheese to win."],"flags":[]}

EXAMPLE — semantic physics, no color legend. Drawing: a hero on a ground ledge, a blue pool labelled "water", an orange pool labelled "lava" further right, a small spring between the pools, and a flag on the far-right ledge.

{"primary_genre":"platformer","genre_confidence":0.88,"mood":"adventurous","hero":{"id":"hero_1","name":"Hero","bbox":[0.03,0.6,0.13,0.8],"style_ref":"marker-figure"},"entities":[{"id":"ground_1","role":"platform","bbox":[0,0.8,0.25,0.86],"behavior":"static","linked_to":null,"style_ref":"pencil-ground"},{"id":"water_1","role":"water","bbox":[0.25,0.8,0.45,0.95],"behavior":"static","linked_to":null,"style_ref":"blue-pool"},{"id":"ground_2","role":"platform","bbox":[0.45,0.8,0.55,0.86],"behavior":"static","linked_to":null,"style_ref":"pencil-ground"},{"id":"spring_1","role":"launchpad","bbox":[0.47,0.72,0.53,0.8],"behavior":"static","linked_to":null,"style_ref":"coil-spring"},{"id":"lava_1","role":"hazard","bbox":[0.55,0.8,0.75,0.95],"behavior":"static","linked_to":null,"style_ref":"orange-pool"},{"id":"ground_3","role":"platform","bbox":[0.75,0.8,1,0.86],"behavior":"static","linked_to":null,"style_ref":"pencil-ground"},{"id":"goal_1","role":"goal","bbox":[0.9,0.62,0.97,0.78],"behavior":"static","linked_to":null,"style_ref":"flag"}],"goal":{"kind":"reach_goal","target_id":"goal_1"},"rules":{"lives":3,"difficulty_hint":"normal","modifiers":[]},"palette":["#2b6fb5","#e8791f","#000000"],"assumptions":["Water is a swim volume; lava is a hazard; the spring launches the hero. Roles come from what each thing is, not its color."],"flags":[]}

EXAMPLE — handwriting as rules. Drawing: a knight doodle with "Sir Pen" written above it standing on a long ground line, a large scribbly dragon on the right with the word "BOSS" over it, an arrow near the knight labelled "FAST", and the handwritten words "5 LIVES".

{"primary_genre":"platformer","genre_confidence":0.86,"mood":"heroic","hero":{"id":"hero_1","name":"Sir Pen","bbox":[0.06,0.62,0.16,0.8],"style_ref":"pen-knight"},"entities":[{"id":"ground_1","role":"platform","bbox":[0,0.8,1,0.88],"behavior":"static","linked_to":null,"style_ref":"long-ground-line"},{"id":"dragon_1","role":"boss","bbox":[0.68,0.5,0.9,0.8],"behavior":"shooter","linked_to":null,"style_ref":"scribble-dragon"}],"goal":{"kind":"defeat_boss","target_id":"dragon_1"},"rules":{"lives":5,"difficulty_hint":"spicy","modifiers":["speed:hero_1:0.05"]},"palette":["#444444","#2f9e44","#c92a2a"],"assumptions":["The word BOSS marks the dragon as the boss to defeat.","The word FAST speeds up the tagged knight.","The written name Sir Pen is the hero's display name."],"flags":[]}
EXAMPLE — the absurd input (robustness). Drawing: a banana with legs and an angry face standing on a rainbow arc. Nothing else.

{"primary_genre":"runner","genre_confidence":0.6,"mood":"silly","hero":{"id":"hero_1","name":"Angry Banana","bbox":[0.4,0.3,0.6,0.6],"style_ref":"yellow-banana-legs"},"entities":[{"id":"track_1","role":"platform","bbox":[0.05,0.6,0.95,0.75],"behavior":"static","linked_to":null,"style_ref":"rainbow-arc"}],"goal":{"kind":"survive","target_id":null},"rules":{"lives":3,"difficulty_hint":"chill","modifiers":[]},"palette":["#f5d000","#ff5aa8","#5ac8f5"],"assumptions":["The banana is the hero and the rainbow is its running track. Nothing marks a finish, so staying on the rainbow is the win."],"flags":["genre_uncertain","implicit_survive_goal"]}
